statement.headerDoc:
STEP Q33-Extended — Universal Attractor Framework extension
  =============================================================

  Paper 126 extension of Paper 120's Q33 hypothesis.

  Original Q33 (informal, 2026-04-20): "every bounded-delta iterated
  map has a universal attractor." On 11 test instances, 10 satisfy
  Q33 and 1 (Rowland sequence) is a counterexample — it diverges.

  This file provides:
    (1) A REFINED Q33 hypothesis: 'bounded state-space + pigeonhole'
        version that IS provable in Lean 4.
    (2) 5 additional instance validations:
        Juggler, Ducci 4-tuple, Kaprekar

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: Zero-sorry verified by lake env lean
